isi.lyrics:
Lyric Dept - Blue

Romanization

Blue in the light where my heartbeat stays,
nae simjangi meomuneun bit, geu anui Blue,
soft in the air like forgotten days.
ithin naldeulcheoreom gonggien budeureoumi nama
Waves of a memory brushing through,
gieogui padoga seuchyeo gago,
opening pages colored in blue.
pureuge muldeun peijideuri yeollyeo.

The wind repeats the truth I knew,
barameun naega imi algo itdeon jinsireul doenoego
carving your name in a deeper hue.
deo jiteun saegeuro ne ireumeul saegyeo.

Blue, I see,
Blue, naneun bwa
your shadow rising back to me.
dasi naegero doraoneun ne geurimjareul.
Blue, I breathe,
Blue, naneun sum swieo
your name, your name won’t ever leave.
ne ireum, ne ireumeun jeoldae sarajiji ana.

Blue on the bark of a winter tree,
gyeoullamuui kkeopjil wie nameun pureumbit,
waiting for spring to set it free.
bomi wa jayurowojigireul gidarimyeo.
Light in the cracks of the coldest night.
gajang chagaun bamui teumsaero seumyeodeuneun bit.

A patient glow beneath the snow,
nun araeseo mungmukhi bitnaneun onggi,
the seed of us beginning to grow.
uriraneun ssiasi joyonghi jarana.

Blue, I see,
Blue, naneun bwa
your shadow rising back to me.
dasi naegero doraoneun ne geurimjareul.
Blue, I breathe,
Blue, naneun sum swieo
your name, your name won’t ever leave.
ne ireum, ne ireumeun jeoldae sarajiji ana.

Through fractured blue, my heart breaks clean,
buseojin pureumbit neomeoro nae maeumeun ttoryeosi kkaejigo,
revealing the truth behind the scene.
geu jangmyeon dwie sumgyeojin jinsiri deureona.
And in that shade, I feel the key—
geu saek aneseo naneun alge dwae,
the part of you still coloring me.
ajikdo nareul muldeurigo inneun neoui ilbu.

Blue, I see,
Blue, naneun bwa
your shadow rising back to me.
dasi naegero doraoneun ne geurimjareul.
Blue, I breathe,
Blue, naneun sum swieo
your name, your name won’t ever leave.
ne ireum, ne ireumeun jeoldae sarajiji ana.
Blue, I stay,
Blue, naneun meomulleo
caught in the echo of yesterday.
eojeui mearie butjaphin chae.
Blue, I stay,
Blue, naneun meomulleo
your name, your name won’t fade away.
ne ireum, ne ireumeun heuryeojiji ana.

Hangeul

Blue in the light where my heartbeat stays,
내 심장이 머무는 빛, 그 안의 Blue,
soft in the air like forgotten days.
잊힌 날들처럼 공기엔 부드러움이 남아
Waves of a memory brushing through,
기억의 파도가 스쳐 가고,
opening pages colored in blue.
푸르게 물든 페이지들이 열려.

The wind repeats the truth I knew,
바람은 내가 이미 알고 있던 진실을 되뇌고
carving your name in a deeper hue.
더 짙은 색으로 네 이름을 새겨.

Blue, I see,
Blue, 나는 봐
your shadow rising back to me.
다시 내게로 돌아오는 네 그림자를.
Blue, I breathe,
Blue, 나는 숨 쉬어
your name, your name won’t ever leave.
네 이름, 네 이름은 절대 사라지지 않아.

Blue on the bark of a winter tree,
겨울나무의 껍질 위에 남은 푸른빛,
waiting for spring to set it free.
봄이 와 자유로워지기를 기다리며.
Light in the cracks of the coldest night.
가장 차가운 밤의 틈새로 스며드는 빛.

A patient glow beneath the snow,
눈 아래서 묵묵히 빛나는 온기,
the seed of us beginning to grow.
우리라는 씨앗이 조용히 자라나.

Blue, I see,
Blue, 나는 봐
your shadow rising back to me.
다시 내게로 돌아오는 네 그림자를.
Blue, I breathe,
Blue, 나는 숨 쉬어
your name, your name won’t ever leave.
네 이름, 네 이름은 절대 사라지지 않아.

Through fractured blue, my heart breaks clean,
부서진 푸른빛 너머로 내 마음은 또렷이 깨지고,
revealing the truth behind the scene.
그 장면 뒤에 숨겨진 진실이 드러나.
And in that shade, I feel the key—
그 색 안에서 나는 알게 돼,
the part of you still coloring me.
아직도 나를 물들이고 있는 너의 일부.

Blue, I see,
Blue, 나는 봐
your shadow rising back to me.
다시 내게로 돌아오는 네 그림자를.
Blue, I breathe,
Blue, 나는 숨 쉬어
your name, your name won’t ever leave.
네 이름, 네 이름은 절대 사라지지 않아.
Blue, I stay,
Blue, 나는 머물러
caught in the echo of yesterday.
어제의 메아리에 붙잡힌 채.
Blue, I stay,
Blue, 나는 머물러
your name, your name won’t fade away.
네 이름, 네 이름은 흐려지지 않아.
